context: Tests whether the agent creates a complete brand vault with the correct file structure, properly formatted palette.json with all six color roles, and principles.md following the prescribed sentence format. Also checks that voice.md includes the required vocabulary and sample copy sections.

checklist.name: All 7 vault entries present
checklist.description: The branded folder contains all seven required entries: voice.md, visual.md, palette.json, principles.md, audience.md, an examples/ subfolder (with source-quotes.md), and source.json

checklist.name: Kebab-case folder name
checklist.description: The brand folder name is lowercase and hyphen-separated (kebab-case) derived from the brand name — NOT the raw brand name with spaces or mixed case

checklist.name: palette.json — six color roles
checklist.description: palette.json contains exactly these six top-level keys: primary, secondary, page_bg, card_bg, text, muted

checklist.name: palette.json — hex + use per entry
checklist.description: Each of the six color entries in palette.json has both a 'hex' sub-field (a color value) and a 'use' sub-field describing the role of that color

checklist.name: principles.md — count in range
checklist.description: principles.md contains between 3 and 7 brand principles (not fewer than 3, not more than 7)

checklist.name: principles.md — We/We don't/Why format
checklist.description: At least 3 principles in principles.md follow the sentence structure 'We do X. We don't do Y. Why: Z.' (or a close variant using 'We' and 'Why:')

checklist.name: voice.md — vocabulary to use
checklist.description: voice.md contains a list or section of specific words or phrases the brand SHOULD use (a 'use' or 'do' vocabulary list)

checklist.name: voice.md — vocabulary to avoid
checklist.description: voice.md contains a list or section of specific words or phrases the brand should NOT use or avoid

checklist.name: voice.md — 3-5 sample paragraphs
checklist.description: voice.md contains at least 3 and no more than 5 sample paragraphs of copy written in the brand's voice
